title: Outputs & Resources — DIGI-METER
description: Browse DIGI-METER project outputs: indicator frameworks, VET toolkits, policy briefs, technical reports, open educational resources, and research deliverables.

strings.source: DIGI-METER deliverables will be published here as they are validated and approved for public release. The planned outputs below are indicative; titles and dates will be confirmed against the approved project application.
strings.value: DIGI-METER deliverables will be published here as they are validated and approved for public release. The planned outputs below are indicative; titles and dates will be confirmed against the approved project application.

strings.source: A comprehensive mapping of all 21 DigComp 2.2 competences into measurable, context-specific indicators for school and VET assessment. Includes operationalisation guidelines, proficiency level descriptors, and evidence criteria.
strings.value: A comprehensive mapping of all 21 DigComp 2.2 competences into measurable, context-specific indicators for school and VET assessment. Includes operationalisation guidelines, proficiency level descriptors, and evidence criteria.

strings.source: Methodological guidelines for assessment item design, bias testing, cultural sensitivity review, and cross-country validation of digital competence indicators across diverse European education systems.
strings.value: Methodological guidelines for assessment item design, bias testing, cultural sensitivity review, and cross-country validation of digital competence indicators across diverse European education systems.

strings.source: State-of-the-Art Review: Digital Competence Assessment in Europe
strings.value: State-of-the-Art Review: Digital Competence Assessment in Europe

strings.source: A systematic literature review of existing digital competence measurement approaches across EU member states, identifying gaps, best practices, and lessons learned to inform the DIGI-METER indicator design.
strings.value: A systematic literature review of existing digital competence measurement approaches across EU member states, identifying gaps, best practices, and lessons learned to inform the DIGI-METER indicator design.

strings.source: The web-based adaptive self-assessment platform enabling learners to evaluate their digital competences across all DigComp 2.2 areas. Features personalised feedback, progress tracking, and multilingual support.
strings.value: The web-based adaptive self-assessment platform enabling learners to evaluate their digital competences across all DigComp 2.2 areas. Features personalised feedback, progress tracking, and multilingual support.

strings.source: Class-level and institution-level visualisation dashboards providing educators and school leaders with anonymised aggregate digital competence data, trend analysis, and intervention recommendations.
strings.value: Class-level and institution-level visualisation dashboards providing educators and school leaders with anonymised aggregate digital competence data, trend analysis, and intervention recommendations.

strings.source: Full technical documentation of the adaptive assessment AI engine, including model design, bias testing results, GDPR compliance architecture, explainability mechanisms, and responsible AI audit trail.
strings.value: Full technical documentation of the adaptive assessment AI engine, including model design, bias testing results, GDPR compliance architecture, explainability mechanisms, and responsible AI audit trail.

strings.source: The research design for multi-country pilot testing, including school and VET partner selection criteria, data collection instruments, ethical research protocols, and comparative analysis framework.
strings.value: The research design for multi-country pilot testing, including school and VET partner selection criteria, data collection instruments, ethical research protocols, and comparative analysis framework.

strings.source: Pilot Findings Report: Learner Outcomes & Platform Performance
strings.value: Pilot Findings Report: Learner Outcomes & Platform Performance

strings.source: Analysis of pilot testing results across participating countries: learner self-assessment patterns, competence gap data, platform usability findings, educator engagement, and recommendations for platform refinement.
strings.value: Analysis of pilot testing results across participating countries: learner self-assessment patterns, competence gap data, platform usability findings, educator engagement, and recommendations for platform refinement.

strings.source: A practical toolkit for VET teachers to integrate digital competence self-assessment into their regular teaching practice, including lesson guides, discussion frameworks, and CPD activity designs.
strings.value: A practical toolkit for VET teachers to integrate digital competence self-assessment into their regular teaching practice, including lesson guides, discussion frameworks, and CPD activity designs.

strings.source: Digital Competence Assessment in Schools: Policy Recommendations for EU Member States
strings.value: Digital Competence Assessment in Schools: Policy Recommendations for EU Member States

strings.source: Evidence-based policy recommendations for national ministries and EU institutions on embedding DigComp 2.2 assessment tools into national curriculum frameworks and digital education strategies.
strings.value: Evidence-based policy recommendations for national ministries and EU institutions on embedding DigComp 2.2 assessment tools into national curriculum frameworks and digital education strategies.

strings.source: VET Sector Digital Skills Benchmark Framework
strings.value: VET Sector Digital Skills Benchmark Framework

strings.source: A policy-oriented benchmark framework connecting DIGI-METER indicators to VET qualification standards, employer expectations, and national digital skills strategies across participating countries.
strings.value: A policy-oriented benchmark framework connecting DIGI-METER indicators to VET qualification standards, employer expectations, and national digital skills strategies across participating countries.

strings.source: Open Educational Resource Pack: Digital Competence for Educators
strings.value: Open Educational Resource Pack: Digital Competence for Educators

strings.source: A freely available collection of learning materials, case studies, and activities supporting educator professional development around digital competence measurement and evidence-based teaching.
strings.value: A freely available collection of learning materials, case studies, and activities supporting educator professional development around digital competence measurement and evidence-based teaching.

strings.source: Subscribe to receive alerts when new deliverables are published.
strings.value: Subscribe to receive alerts when new deliverables are published.

strings.source: Measuring Digital Competence for Resilient Learning Ecosystems. An Erasmus+ Forward-Looking project translating DigComp 2.2 into actionable, trustworthy educational testing.
strings.value: Measuring Digital Competence for Resilient Learning Ecosystems. An Erasmus+ Forward-Looking project translating DigComp 2.2 into actionable, trustworthy educational testing.
